roles.label: Military Analyst

roles.label: Political Analyst
roles.focus: regime durability, executive insecurity, elite instability, coercive stress, institutional erosion

roles.label: Security Analyst

roles.label: International Analyst
roles.focus: sanctions, diplomatic pressure, external alignment, foreign security support, multilateral leverage

roles.focus: inflation, debt, foreign-exchange stress, fiscal fragility, policy shock, macro-political spillovers

roles.label: Synthesis Analyst
roles.focus: cross-lens integration and overall concern level
